title: Caldera - System Information Discovery via systeminfo and WMI (Windows)
description: Detects non-APT system reconnaissance commands used by Caldera T1082 emulation. The operation runs systeminfo.exe, wmic commands, and PowerShell Get-ComputerInfo to enumerate OS version, hotfix history, BIOS details, and hardware specs. Complements the BLUELIGHT browser-child WMI rule with general emulation patterns.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\systeminfo.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*os get*' or 'Command Line' like '*computersystem get*' or 'Command Line' like '*cpu get*' or 'Command Line' like '*bios get*' or 'Command Line' like '*qfe list*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Get-ComputerInfo*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-WmiObject Win32_OperatingSystem*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-WmiObject Win32_ComputerSystem*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-WmiObject Win32_BIOS*' or 'Command Line' like '*[System.Environment]::OSVersion*')))
falsepositives: Software deployment tools checking OS compatibility
